svg.title: Tsai versatile camera calibration pipeline
svg.desc: 6-stage pipeline from sub-pixel feature extraction through distorted-pixel conversion, linear RAC solve for extrinsics and scale, closed-form recovery of R and T, linear focal-length approximation, to Levenberg-Marquardt refinement of focal length, depth translation, and radial distortion.

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #111827
